description: Build an internal IT Service Management (ITSM) portal for a telecom company's Corporate IT department. The system must support incident ticketing (create, assign, escalate, resolve), change request management with approval workflows, a self-service knowledge base, SLA tracking with breach alerts, and an asset inventory linked to tickets. Use Django REST Framework and Python 3.11 for the backend, Vue 3 and TypeScript for the frontend, and PostgreSQL for the database. Implement three user roles: end-user, IT technician, and IT manager. Send email notifications on ticket state changes. Include a dashboard showing open tickets by priority, SLA compliance rate, and mean time to resolution (MTTR) by category.
input: Build an IT Service Management portal with incident ticketing, knowledge base, SLA tracking, and asset inventory for a telecom company
